title: Yuki's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Yuki plays peek-a-boo with sleepy animals hiding around her bedroom before going to sleep herself.

pages.text: Yuki is ready for bed. But where are all her sleepy friends hiding?

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes stands in a cozy bedroom, looking around curiously. A teddy bear's paw peeks out from behind a blue curtain, and a bunny ear is visible under a partially lifted blanket on the bed.
illustration.alt: Yuki in pajamas looking around her bedroom with hidden animals peeking out

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Teddy Bear was hiding behind the curtain. 'Time for sleep!' says Teddy.

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes pulls back a blue curtain to reveal a brown teddy bear. The curtain is lifted like a flap, showing the surprise reveal moment with stars twinkling outside the window.
illustration.alt: Yuki discovering teddy bear behind the bedroom curtain

pages.text: Who's under the blanket? Peek-a-boo! It's Bunny Rabbit yawning. 'So sleepy!' says Bunny.

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lifts a soft pink blanket on her bed to reveal a white bunny rabbit yawning. The blanket appears partially lifted like a flap, creating a peek-a-boo moment with the drowsy bunny underneath.
illustration.alt: Yuki lifting blanket to find yawning bunny rabbit

pages.text: Look! Kitty Cat is hiding in the toy box. Peek-a-boo! 'Meow, goodnight!' purrs Kitty.

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes opens a wooden toy box lid to discover an orange tabby cat curled up inside. The toy box lid is partially open like a flap, revealing the sleepy cat among colorful toys.
illustration.alt: Yuki opening toy box to find sleepy orange cat inside

pages.text: Now Yuki climbs into bed with all her sleepy friends. Peek-a-boo, goodnight! Sweet dreams, Yuki!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes snuggled in bed under a cozy blanket with teddy bear, bunny rabbit, and kitty cat all sleeping peacefully beside her. The bedroom is dimly lit with soft moonlight filtering through the curtains, creating a peaceful bedtime scene.
illustration.alt: Yuki sleeping peacefully in bed with all her animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where was Teddy Bear hiding?
questions.explanation: Teddy Bear was hiding behind the blue curtain in Yuki's bedroom!

questions.question: What was Bunny Rabbit doing under the blanket?
questions.explanation: Bunny Rabbit was yawning because it was sleepy time!

questions.question: Where did Kitty Cat hide?
questions.explanation: Kitty Cat was curled up hiding in the wooden toy box!
